title: User-renamable gallery cards (group customName)
description: Let users give a gallery card a custom name via the existing card context menu. NEW FIELD: group.customName (string|null) on the ItemGroup object in project.json itemGroups[] (groups live INLINE in project.json, NOT in a .meta sidecar — only history ITEMS get sidecars; do not invent a group sidecar). Precedence everywhere: customName || <existing derive>. The card name is currently DERIVED, never user-owned: MpiGalleryGrid.js:786 reads `selected?.name || group.name || ''`. customName must WIN and STICK so the next generation into the group does not clobber it. THREE READ SITES (display only): (1) gallery card hover name — MpiGalleryGrid.js:786, prepend `group.customName ||`; (2) History breadcrumb crumb — navigation.js:244 `setGroupLabel(group?.customName || group?.name || 'Group')`; (3) MpiProjectName component is dumb (caller pushes the string) — untouched. WRITE PATH (gallery card ONLY, per user): add a 'Rename' item to the card context menu next to 'Card notes' (MpiGalleryGrid.js:913), disabled unless exactly 1 card selected. Action = swap the `.mpi-group-card__name` span for an INLINE MpiInput (focus + select-all), Enter/blur commits, Esc cancels. EMPTY/whitespace commit => customName = null (falls back to derived = the 'un-rename' affordance). Trim. Persist via updateProjectJson() (the per-file queued atomic write chokepoint — NO direct fs.writeJson) and replace the top-level state key (state.currentProject = {...state.currentProject, itemGroups:[...]}, never mutate a sub-object in place). VERIFY: project-integrity reconcile/hydrate PRESERVES the new group.customName key (group scalars come from project.json's itemGroups[] on reload — confirm the group rebuild does not drop non-enumerated keys). COORDINATION — overlaps MPI-127 (audio media type, Phase 4.5 landed today): both cards touch MpiGalleryGrid.js. MPI-127 added _swapThumbToAudio + _ensureAudioCardControls where AUDIO card-click = play/pause toggle. The inline-rename edit must stopPropagation so typing/committing on an audio card does NOT trigger audio playback, and rename must work for audio groups too (audio groups are non-click-through but still renamable via context menu). Sequence after MPI-127's MpiGalleryGrid edits settle to avoid a parallel-edit collision. ~40 lines.
